LLM-judged: a cartoon of a Gram-negative cell envelope showing Lipid A in the outer membrane alongside a Δfur mutant cell lacking Lipid A but retaining viability anchors the genetic-metabolic claim visually.

LLM-judged: a 3-panel strip anchoring Fur-regulon → RB-TnSeq fitness enrichment → outer-membrane proteome would give domain-specific visual structure to the three evidence streams.
